title: Fit test - All screens are properly translated to different languages
scenario: Fit Test feature screens are not properly translated when phone language is changed on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Change the phone's system language to the target language (e.g., French, German, Japanese, etc.).
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device connected.
3. On the Home screen, tap the device name to open Device Settings.
4. Navigate to Audio Settings → Fit Test.
5. Tap the Tutorial screen link/button to open the Fit Test tutorial.
6. Verify all text on the Tutorial screen is properly translated.
7. Tap Fit Test to start the test.
8. Complete a successful fit test (e.g., seal detected as good).
9. Verify all on-screen text, labels, and results messages are properly translated.
10. Tap Fit Test again to start another test.
11. Complete a failed fit test (e.g., seal detected as poor or no seal).
12. Verify all on-screen text, labels, error messages, and retry prompts are properly translated.
expected: All text on every screen of the Fit Test feature (Tutorial, successful fit test result, failed fit test result) is properly translated into the target language with no untranslated English strings, truncation, or placeholder text.
